name: testAcquirerSuccessfullyCreatedAndAppearsInDropdown
description: Verify that a new Acquirer can be successfully created and appears in the Acquirers dropdown.
descriptionHtml: Verify that a new Acquirer can be successfully created and appears in the Acquirers dropdown.
